mapper.select: SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.title, a.content, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, a.status e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM approval a JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id
SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.applicant_id = #{applicantId}
SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.calendar_id = #{calendarId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar(start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id) VALUES (#{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantId})
